name: What's the time limit to file my work injury claim? I got hurt 3 months ago.
description: 180 days notice Utah, 1 year Idaho—file now before it's too late.

mainEntity.name: What's the time limit to file my work injury claim? I got hurt 3 months ago.

acceptedAnswer.text: 180 days notice Utah, 1 year Idaho—file now before it's too late.
acceptedAnswer.description: Deadlines vary: 180 days notice in Utah, 1 year in Idaho from injury or last treatment; don't wait as evidence fades. Federal guidelines emphasize prompt reporting. Key factors: Start date is injury or diagnosis; extensions rare for good cause; missing bars benefits. Check your state's labor dept site, document notice date, file Form immediately. Consult local attorney to confirm deadline.
